ORDER RE MOTION TO AMEND CROSS-COMPLAINT (GRANTING RICHARD MILLIKEN'S MOTION)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT RICHARD MILLIKEN'S MOTION TO AMEND CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT RICHARD MILLIKEN MAY FILE A DOE AMENDMENT TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT NAMING THE DRIVER INVOLVED IN THE SEPTEMBER 2014 ACCIDENT AS DOE 1 WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT IT SERVES THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE AND JUDICIAL ECONOMY TO ALLOW CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO AMEND THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. THE MARCH 23, 2015 TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 21, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/SRB)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RICHARD MILLIKEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DISCOVERY COURT ORDER AND FOR SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATION OF ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART. THE MOVING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO $1,737.50 IN SANCTIONS. THE COURT DENIES THE ISSUE SANCTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO APPLY FOR ISSUE PRECLUSION REGARDING LOST INCOME. Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Hester, of Law Offices of Tanya Gomerman, Tel. 415.545.8608, for plaintiffs;
Scott Schwartz, of Rust Armenis & Schwartz, Tel. 415.765.5910, for defendant.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD MILLIKEN'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Discovery Court Order And For Sanctions For Violation Of Order is granted in part. The moving party is entitled to $1,737.50 in sanctions. The court denies the issue sanction without prejudice. Defendant to apply for issue preclusion regarding lost income. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Motion To Amend Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. TONY RICUCCI OF THE LAW OFFICES OF TANYA GOMERMAN, TEL. NO. 545-8608 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SCOTT SCHWARTZ, TEL. NO. 365-5910 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT RICHARD MILLIKEN;
ATTY. FREDERICK A. PATTERSON OF THE STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3473 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT LI.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICHARD MILLIKEN'S Motion To Amend Cross-Complaint is Granted. Cross-Complainant Richard Milliken may file a Doe amendment to the Cross-Complaint naming the driver involved in the September 2014 accident as Doe 1 within 10 days of entry of this Order. The Court finds that it serves the interests of justice and judicial economy to allow Cross-Complainant to amend the Cross-Complaint. The March 23, 2015 trial date is continued to September 21, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/sb
